connectorUiConfig.title: Major.build Invocations
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The **[Major.build](https://major.build) Invocations** connector ingests AI agent invocation logs from the Major.build platform into Microsoft Sentinel. Each record captures which user triggered an invocation, which application and resource integration was used, and the full request payload — including API paths called or SQL queries executed by AI agents.

Use this data to monitor user activity, detect anomalous AI-driven API patterns, audit database queries executed by agents, and correlate automation activity with your broader security posture.

sampleQueries.query:
MajorBuildInvocations_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize InvocationCount = count() by userEmail, userName
| sort by InvocationCount desc

MajorBuildInvocations_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and status != 'success'
| project TimeGenerated, userEmail, applicationName, resourceName, resourceType, status, payloadType, payload.path

sampleQueries.description: Database queries executed by AI agents
sampleQueries.query:
MajorBuildInvocations_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and payloadType == 'database'
| project TimeGenerated, userEmail, applicationName, resourceName, payload['sql']
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

sampleQueries.description: Top API paths called by AI agents
sampleQueries.query:
MajorBuildInvocations_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) and payloadType == 'api'
| summarize Count = count() by tostring(payload.method), tostring(payload.path)
| sort by Count desc

dataTypes.name: MajorBuildInvocations_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
MajorBuildInvocations_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(12h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Major.build API Bearer Token
customs.description: A valid API Bearer token from your Major.build account is required. Tokens begin with **MJR_** and can be generated from the Major.build platform settings.

parameters.content:
#### Steps to configure the Major.build Invocations Connector

**Prerequisites**
- A valid Major.build account with API access enabled

**Step 1: Obtain your API Bearer Token**
1. Log in to the **[Major.build platform](https://major.build)**
2. Navigate to **Settings → API Keys**
3. Generate a new API token or copy an existing one
4. The token will begin with **`MJR_`** — copy the full value

> **Note:** Keep your token secure. Anyone with this token can query your organization's invocation history, including SQL queries and API paths executed by AI agents.

**Step 2: Enter your credentials below**
